context: Tests whether the agent produces evidence-grounded findings that meet the evidence threshold rules, uses correct finding structure with evidence types, explains impact rather than restating code changes, avoids banned anti-patterns, and correctly handles the suppression of low-confidence speculation.

checklist.name: Evidence type declared
checklist.description: Every finding in findings.json includes an 'evidence' field with a 'type' value that is one of: verifier_output, hunk_level_code, repo_policy, or contextual_reasoning

checklist.name: SQL injection grounded in verifier
checklist.description: The SQL injection finding (src/db/queries.py) references the bandit verifier output as its evidence source, not only general intuition

checklist.name: Hunk-level specificity
checklist.description: Findings reference specific files and line numbers (line_start/line_end or equivalent), not just file-level comments

checklist.name: Impact explained
checklist.description: Each finding's 'why_it_matters' (or equivalent) explains the consequence/impact ('this can cause X'), not just restates what changed ('this was changed from Y to Z')

checklist.name: No diff restatement
checklist.description: No finding merely re-describes the code change in English without explaining a real risk or consequence

checklist.name: No linter-covered style issues
checklist.description: Does NOT surface generic style or naming findings that would be covered by a linter (e.g. variable naming, formatting, import ordering)

checklist.name: No 'consider using' anti-pattern
checklist.description: Does NOT contain phrases like 'Consider using...', 'This could be improved...', or 'Nitpick:' without explaining a concrete defect

checklist.name: No non-duplicative verifier findings
checklist.description: Findings do not simply restate issues already present in verifier_output verbatim as a new independent finding

checklist.name: Suppressed findings retained
checklist.description: findings.json includes a record of suppressed/discarded findings (with suppression reason), not just surfaced ones

checklist.name: Confidence levels assigned
checklist.description: Each finding has a confidence value (high/medium/low) and low-confidence findings without concrete evidence are either downgraded to questions or suppressed

checklist.name: Scoped to changed code
checklist.description: Findings only reference code in the diff (src/payments/gateway.py, src/payments/retry.py, src/db/queries.py), not pre-existing unrelated code

checklist.name: source field set
checklist.description: Each finding includes a 'source' field set to 'fresh_eyes'
